translation.literal_translation: But, for another purpose, says Jaimini - because of question and explanation; and so (teach) some recensions as well. (18)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.18: Jaimini interprets jiva-reference as instrumental to a different aim (Brahman-realization), supported by the question-answer structure and by certain recensional readings.
translation.interpretive_note: Jaimini-nyaya sutra: auxiliary jiva mention within a Brahman-oriented teaching arc.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Literal keeps sutra compactness with explicit Jaimini attribution.
Technical summary depends on the surrounding bhashya unpacking of anyartham.
